items.title: Elements of Information Theory (Cover & Thomas)
items.author: Thomas M. Cover, Joy A. Thomas
items.note: Standard reference for KL divergence, relative entropy, and information-theoretic inequalities.

items.title: Kullback–Leibler divergence (Wikipedia)
items.author: Wikipedia contributors
items.note: Accessible summary of definition, properties, and common identities including the entropy decomposition.

items.title: PyTorch kl_div documentation
items.author: PyTorch Developers
items.note: API reference for computing KL in training loops; note log-target conventions and reduction modes.
